tuning_key.text: Release attachments to outcomes we've drawn / The schemas we're tied to turn us into pawns
tuning_key.attribution: Chords of Truth — Lucid Principles Canon (CC BY 4.0)

context_block: Today belongs to the exhale we have been postponing. The shapes of tomorrow we clutched so tightly became armor against the very current that wants to carry us, and we discover now that the water was never something we needed to grip. What returns will not come from the force of our demand but from the space we finally allow between our palms.

practice.title: Locate the Grip
practice.instruction: Find where your body is currently bracing for impact—perhaps the hands, the jaw, or the breath itself—and simply witness the tension without demanding it change.

practice.title: Soften the Resistance
practice.instruction: Invite a single exhale to travel all the way through that held place, letting the body remember it is allowed to loosen without losing its place in the world.

practice.title: Open to the Current
practice.instruction: As the echo audio plays, physically open your hands and let the future shapes you were white-knuckling drift away into the warmth, allowing yourself to be carried.
